issues.title: Duplicate ProductDetail component tree (PascalCase vs kebab-case folder)
issues.description: There are two nearly identical product detail component trees: `apps/store/src/features/products/presentation/components/ProductDetail/` and `apps/store/src/features/products/presentation/components/product-detail/`. The files are 100% identical in logic — the only diffs are import paths that reference their own sibling folder. The active tree imported by `ProductDetailPage.tsx` is `ProductDetail/` (PascalCase). The `product-detail/` tree appears to be a leftover copy from a rename/refactor.
issues.fix: Delete the unused `product-detail/` (kebab-case) folder entirely. `ProductDetailPage.tsx` already imports only from `ProductDetail/` (PascalCase). Verify no other consumer imports from `product-detail/` before deleting.

issues.title: Duplicate lucideIconMap file
issues.description:
The file `lucideIconMap.ts` (containing `ICON_MAP`, `DEFAULT_ICON_NAME`, and `getIcon`) is 100% identical in two locations:
- `apps/store/src/features/products/presentation/utils/lucideIconMap.ts`
- `apps/store/src/features/products/presentation/components/product-detail/lucideIconMap.ts`

The `CardsSection` in `ProductDetail/Sections/` imports from the `utils/` path, while the `product-detail/` copy is only used within its own (duplicate) tree.
issues.fix: Remove `product-detail/lucideIconMap.ts` as part of the same cleanup in DRY-001. The canonical copy is `presentation/utils/lucideIconMap.ts`.

issues.title: Duplicate useSellerProfiles hook (root application/ vs application/hooks/)
issues.description:
The `useSellerProfiles` hook is defined twice:
- `apps/store/src/features/cart/application/useSellerProfiles.ts` — uses `createBrowserSupabaseClient()` directly and hardcodes query key `"seller-profiles"`.
- `apps/store/src/features/cart/application/hooks/useSellerProfiles.ts` — uses `useSupabase()` from shared and references `SELLER_PROFILES_QUERY_KEY` constant.

The `hooks/` version is the canonical one (imported in the barrel `cart/index.ts` and used by `CartDrawer`). The root-level file is a stale copy. Both have their own test files with near-identical content.
issues.fix: Delete `application/useSellerProfiles.ts` and `application/useSellerProfiles.test.ts` (root-level copies). The canonical versions are under `application/hooks/`.

issues.title: Duplicate useFlyToCart hook (root application/ vs application/hooks/)
issues.description:
Same duplication pattern as DRY-003. `useFlyToCart` exists at both:
- `apps/store/src/features/cart/application/useFlyToCart.ts`
- `apps/store/src/features/cart/application/hooks/useFlyToCart.ts`

Both files and their test files (`useFlyToCart.test.ts`) are identical. The `hooks/` location is canonical (used by `FlyToCartContext.tsx`).
issues.fix: Delete `application/useFlyToCart.ts` and `application/useFlyToCart.test.ts` (root-level copies). The canonical versions are under `application/hooks/`.

issues.title: Duplicated Supabase admin REST client utility code across apps
issues.description:
The core logic of the Supabase service-role REST client is duplicated across two apps:
- `apps/admin/src/app/api/admin/_shared/adminRest.ts`
- `apps/payments/src/shared/infrastructure/adminRestClient.ts`

Both share:
- Identical `SUPABASE_URL_INTERNAL` / `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` resolution logic
- Identical `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` usage pattern
- Identical `createRestPath(table, query)` implementation (only minor diff: admin version allows optional `query`, payments version requires it)
- Identical `adminFetch` / `adminFetchJson` pattern: `fetch` + `cache: no-store` + body-consume-on-error
- Identical `validateUuid` function (different regex variants: admin uses RFC4122 version-constrained pattern, payments uses a more permissive pattern)

These are two separate apps so some duplication is acceptable per monorepo rules. However, since the utility is purely infrastructure with no app-specific config or i18n, it is a candidate for a shared package.
issues.fix: Consider extracting a shared `supabase-admin-rest` utility into `packages/shared` or a new `packages/api-server` package. At minimum, unify the `validateUuid` regex — the two regexes differ in strictness (version bits) which could cause inconsistent behavior.

issues.title: Duplicate product filter search params between store and studio
issues.description:
The product filter search params object is defined twice with identical fields:
- `apps/store/src/features/products/domain/searchParams.ts` exports `catalogSearchParams` with `{ category, type, q }`
- `apps/studio/src/features/products/domain/searchParams.ts` exports `productsSearchParams` with `{ type, category, q }` (same fields, different order)

Both use `parseAsString.withDefault("")` for all three fields.
issues.fix: These are in separate apps so duplication is less impactful. If both apps are expected to stay in sync on product filter params, consider a shared constant for the field names (e.g. in `packages/shared`). Otherwise, this is acceptable given the apps evolve independently.

issues.title: MAX_INITIALS_LENGTH magic constant defined twice
issues.description:
The value `2` for max initials length is defined as:
- `MAX_INITIALS_LENGTH = 2` in `apps/admin/src/features/users/domain/constants.ts` (properly imported by `getInitials.ts`)
- `const MAX_INITIALS_LENGTH = 2` as a local constant inside `apps/studio/src/features/seller-admins/presentation/components/DelegateList.tsx`

The studio component also computes initials inline (`getDisplayName(profile).slice(0, MAX_INITIALS_LENGTH).toUpperCase()`) rather than using a shared utility.
issues.fix: Since `getInitials` is an admin-specific utility, the simplest fix (KISS) is just removing the local `MAX_INITIALS_LENGTH` constant in `DelegateList.tsx` and inlining the value `.slice(0, 2)`. Alternatively, if initials computation is needed in studio beyond this component, extract a `getInitials` util to `packages/shared`.

patterns.name: Leftover root-level hook files after migration to hooks/ subfolder
patterns.description: Multiple hooks in `apps/store/src/features/cart/application/` exist at both the root application level and under `application/hooks/`. This pattern suggests an in-progress or incomplete migration. Root-level files (useFlyToCart, useSellerProfiles) are stale copies of their `hooks/` counterparts.
patterns.recommendation: Establish a rule that all feature hooks live under `application/hooks/` and clean up root-level duplicates.

patterns.name: Duplicate folder for product detail components
patterns.description: The `ProductDetail/` and `product-detail/` directories appear to be the result of a naming convention change (PascalCase to kebab-case or vice versa) that was never completed. The production code uses `ProductDetail/` (PascalCase), while `product-detail/` is unreferenced by any non-self-referencing file.
patterns.recommendation: Complete the cleanup by deleting the unused `product-detail/` tree.
